title: Staff Learning Experience Designer
description: Customer-facing learning content, AI-enabled workflows, and design systems at scale.
highlights: Implemented AI workflows to speed up and improve the quality of customer-facing deliverables, resulting in a 15% increase in team output.
Led initiatives to bring AI models into courseware to improve efficacy and facilitate skill transfer.
Structured content database with over 300 records of courses, labs, assessments, and achievement badges for maintenance cycles and internal consumption.
Created and maintained content templates for on-demand customer-facing content used in certifications and exam preparations.
Developed design system and standards for on-demand content, generating a 30% increase in retention and user satisfaction.
Drove company initiative to modernize content offering to increase content effectiveness and stickiness by evaluating new authoring tools and approaches.
Built content review process to streamline peer review before semi-monthly publication, reducing re-publishing time by 10%.
Implemented education team's customer feedback mechanism to make informed decisions about content direction and focus.
Recognition: GCAS Collaborator Award, GCAS Innovator Award, CEdMA Pinnacle Award for innovation.
presentationLabel: Watch my presentation on "Next Generation Learning"

title: Founder & Learning Evangelist
description: Consulting practice for L&D, eLearning, video, LMS, and interactive development.
highlights: Developed a book of business of clients seeking learning and development skills on a temporary basis, including eLearning content development, video production, audio engineering, assessments and feedback, interactive games, LMS implementation and administration.
Increased client consumption by 400% YoY by bringing in-person offering to on-demand format.
Transitioned content for over 250 courses into client's new LMS, offering consulting services during conversations with LMS vendor for veterinary continuing education client.
Reduced time to value by over 2 months by developing templates and optimized delivery strategy for veterinary client.

title: Learning Experience Designer
description: Product education and template systems for large course catalogs.
highlights: Partnered with instructional designers to deliver quarterly product feature updates with customers and employees using video, product simulation, and assessment via knowledge checks and quizzes.
Designed Storyline template for a battery of 300 courses to align with company branding and reduce quality assurance process by 2.5 business days.
Implemented JIRA workflow process for cross-team project management, saving an average of 20 working hours per week across the team.
Launched and managed professional development program for the learning team to enhance their professional skills.

title: LMS Analyst (Sales Enablement)
description: Global LMS operations, localization, and integrations.
highlights: Localized platform and content for 5 languages worldwide.
Maintained and improved functionality of LMS for employee and partner-facing content, including over 1,200 courses.
Identified optimal user experience of on-demand course content and created template for all 7 instructional designers to use for authoring courses.
Developed strategy for internal training efforts around compliance and security resulting in a 95% completion rate, up from 70% year prior.
Integrated new technical solutions to send data from the LMS into Salesforce for visibility into partner certification status and progress.
Deployed employee compliance cycle to ensure compliance and company de-risking.
